subcodes.first_line: The Cup-bearer of the Wine of Immortality hath ever been the Lord of Names. Blessed is the soul that partaketh of the Most Pure Wine in the days of the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ساقی رحیق بقا مالک اسما بوده طوبی از برای نفسیکه رحیق اطهر را در ایام مالک
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @knowledge; recognition of God, @chastisement and requital, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @living waters; water of life
